ham.subject: Out of Office: Jane Doe
ham.body:
Hi,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office and will not be checking email until July 15th. I will respond to your message upon my return.

For urgent matters, please contact John Smith at john.smith@example.com.

Best regards,
Jane

spam.subject: URGENT: Account Verification Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected suspicious activity on your account and require your immediate attention. To verify your identity and secure your account, please join the following Zoom meeting:

Meeting ID: 123 456 7890
Passcode: 987654
Link: <URL>

This meeting is mandatory. Failure to attend will result in temporary suspension of your account.

Please confirm your attendance by replying to this email at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,
The Security Team
